arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid: FIFA opens SPECIAL transfer window as new bid launched for Liverpool defender
arts.sum: Liverpool could land a surprising transfer windfall from Trent Alexander-Arnold as Real Madrid aim to secure the services of the England full-back early. As such, Real Madrid are still in position to spend on Alexander-Arnold, whose contract with Liverpool does not expire until 30 June – midway through the new tournament.

arts.ttl: Who will be in the dugout for Liverpool vs Southampton as Arne Slot serves touchline ban
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news as Arne Slot continues to serve a touchline ban as the Reds take on Southampton in the Premier League

arts.ttl: PSG more confident than ever about Champions League progression against Liverpool
arts.sum: Despite a 1-0 defeat at home to Liverpool on Wednesday, Paris Saint-Germain’s confidence of progressing in the UEFA Champions League has not been dented. Quite the opposite, according to L’Équipe. PSG…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich plot sale of Liverpool target to finance record-breaking buy
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are planning a very active transfer window that could impact Liverpool, Manchester City and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer fires Liverpool Carabao Cup final warning with clear Newcastle demand
arts.sum: Former Newcastle United striker Alan Shearer has offered his view on this month's Carabao Cup final against Liverpool

arts.ttl: Approach made: Liverpool have asked about €40m transfer as star cleared to leave
arts.sum: Liverpool have reportedly made an enquiry about Bayern Munich winger Kingsley Coman as he’s likely to be on the move in this summer’s transfer window. The Frenchman could be available for around €40m, according to Sky Germany journalist Florian Plettenberg, but it seems the player himself would prefer a move to Saudi Arabia. arts.ttl: Liverpool enquire about a potential move for Kingsley Coman
arts.sum: According to Florian Plettenberg, Kingsley Coman (28) is planning to leave Bayern Munich during the summer transfer window. After 8 years with the Bundesliga giants, the France international attacker is planning…

arts.ttl: Who is referee Lewis Smith? The Premier League newcomer in charge of Liverpool vs Southampton
arts.sum: Lewis Smith will take charge of his first Premier League game at Anfield on Saturday afternoon when Liverpool host rock-bottom Southampton.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool determined to swoop for £42m transfer following development at Man United
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly determined to win the race for the transfer of Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez this summer. This comes as it also looks like Manchester United have cooled their interest in the Hungary international after looking at him in January, according to TEAMtalk. arts.ttl: Liverpool plan £42m transfer bid for 13 G/A man, Arsenal & Man Utd also interested
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly planning to test Brighton’s resolve with a bid of around £42m for the potential transfer of Joao Pedro, according to Empire of the Kop.
